Imbued Elven Chainmail Leggings  
 


Slot: LEGS
AC: 8
CHA: +2 WIS: +3 INT: +3
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except SHD MNK SHM NEC BST BER
Race: ELF HIE HEF
Deity: Tunare
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Imbued Elven Chainmail Leggings

Slot: LEGS
AC: 8
CHA: +2 WIS: +3 INT: +3
SV MAGIC: +4
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM

Race: ELF HIE HEF
Deity: Tunare
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Appearance:Chain
Tint:

Lucky at 151 skill!
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 4:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593374839323
2 posts
A high elf paladin made this tunic for me at a skill level of 151. Guess I was real lucky at the time, should have played lotto that night, hehe!

Edited, Fri Feb 14 04:17:53 2003

The trivial for the item is 141, How were you lucky?

NO BOOTS !!!
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 11:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759292023
31 posts
Anyone made the boots yet that can post the stats on them here? I checked Allakhazam and they dont have them listed. According to other posts I have read to make Imbued you follow the regular Chainmail recipe and then add an Imbued Emerald. My skill is only 168 in smithing right now and its going to be a little while before I can make any of this stuff, so just curious for more info. Thanks in advance. :)
▲ Page top
NO BOOTS !!!
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 11:56 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759292023
31 posts
? double post ?
▲ Page top
WTB 2 sets of armor
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 8:08 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If someone on Que server could contact me with some prices and an ETA on armor I'd like to get 2 sets of armor.

Dharclily 34 Druid
▲ Page top
Recipe
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 3:18 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
1 moonlight temper(1 morning dew, 2 moonlight essences(rare from MM vamps), 1 swirling mist(very rare from mist/steam elementals), helf smithy hammer, 3 enchanted mithril rings(made from ore enchanted by 49 enc), silk swatch, chain legs pattern, imbued emerald (49 cleric/druid who worships tunare) - combine in hi elf racial forge by hi elf and viola! Note trivial is 230-250+

In other words, expect to pay a lot. I'm getting close to 190 and have botched every attempt - the tempers are a nightmare (135 brewing trivial) because the components drop so rarely and even though none of this stuff exists on my server and there might be 6 people trying to make it people feel the need to ask for 50pp for one swirling mist...but the stats our wonderful for Hi Elf Enchanters who worship tunare in more than a couple slots so I'm gonna keep on it.

Ynfynyty Watchyr
Mindflayer, Souldbinder, Spiritfueler, and general Clusterfixer of IW, TT.
▲ Page top
RE: Recipe
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361342515
5 posts
FYI...not sure where i read it, but cultural armor cannot even be attempted successfully until you get a skill over 200 (201 threshold of specialization). Would make sense.

And i have 2 people helping me make this stuff, i then split the profits of any sales with them. One constantly farms for essence in MM and kithicor (she's insane), the other camps Najena insessently. But averaging 1k to 4k a piece, its worth their time.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 23 2001 at 2:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Receipe?
#REDACTED, Posted: May 22 2001 at 11:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) these would rock on a monk!
Nice
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 9:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757592958
73 posts
This would make nice mid-range/twink gear. Light and adds some key stats for casters
▲ Page top
RE: Nice
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 11:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361342515
5 posts
I agree...as a 55 druid with only one piece of Planes gear (what can i say, i'm just unlucky) this stuff rounds out my wis at over 200 and still allows room for plenty of resist gear.

I'd say it makes nice transitition gear between that mid range / high end and the uber gear of the planes and velious quests (so many gems...so little leather ::sigh::)
▲ Page top
Actually not even twink ;)
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 11:42 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts
This would be good stuff for wood elf druids even in the 50's before you have velious armor or verm (which basically never drops) on chest or legs.

Elf is wood elf, while hie is high elf and HEF is half elf, of course.

MR on wood elf druid body parts is rare, so bonus. I'd like these even though I already have kromriff military quest legs.
